hero.title: Travel between villages
hero.subtitle: YaVoy connects neighbors who need to go to the doctor, market, or city with those already driving. Less expenses, more community.

howItWorks.subtitle: As simple as asking a neighbor for a favor

step3.description: Travel together, keep each other company, and share gas costs.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: We answer your questions about how YaVoy works.

transport.question: Is YaVoy a transport company?
transport.answer: No, YaVoy is just a tool to connect neighbors. We don't have hired drivers or a fleet of cars. These are private individuals sharing their regular routes.

payment.question: Do I have to pay to use YaVoy?
payment.answer: Using the website is completely free. Travel costs (gas) are agreed directly between driver and passenger. YaVoy takes no commission.

contact.question: How do I contact the driver?
contact.answer: On each ride, you'll see a WhatsApp button or phone number. Contact the person directly to confirm pickup time and location.

costs.question: Is sharing costs mandatory?
costs.answer: It's common and fair, but it depends on each driver. Some just want company, others need help with gas. Discuss it before leaving.

cancel.question: What if I want to cancel a ride?
cancel.answer: Please notify as soon as possible. Message or call the person you had arranged with. As a neighborhood network, communication and respect are fundamental.

footer.disclaimer: YaVoy is a pilot in testing phase. We connect people, we don't operate transport.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
